response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced full-stack engineer with a strong craftsmanship background, but the role requires deep, current C++ expertise for industrial automation. His C++ exposure is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments and a bachelor thesis project, while his career centers on TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web platforms. He shows no evidence of IEC 62443/SDL practices, MQTT, message brokers in C++, or industrial-cybersecurity work, and his overall tenure far exceeds the 8–12 year target profile for this mid-senior band.
strengths: Proven low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, fibers, caching at Sociomantic)
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, and open-source contributions
Broad polyglot background spanning embedded, desktop, web, and event-driven platforms
concerns: Minimal professional C++ experience; primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang
No industrial automation, IEC 62443, SDL, MQTT, or OT-protocol experience evident
No demonstrated Azure or message-broker-based C++ architecture work required by the role
